metadata.description: VM administrator password. Auto-generated per deployment if not supplied (newGuid). Stored securely in Key Vault — never output by this template.
Object ID of the principal deploying this template. Used for Key Vault access policy. Omit to skip access policy (add manually later).
Key Vault name. Must be globally unique, 3-24 alphanumeric/hyphen chars, starting with a letter.
ExpressRoute Gateway SKU. Start with ErGw1AZ for the upgrade demo; use script 3 to upgrade to ErGwScale.
Object ID of the deploying principal. Leave empty to skip access policy.

properties.accessPolicies: [if(empty(parameters('deployerObjectId')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('tenantId', subscription().tenantId, 'objectId', parameters('deployerObjectId'), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get', 'list', 'set', 'delete', 'recover', 'backup', 'restore')))))]
